title: Saudi Arabian Cookies with Pastry
description: A traditional Saudi dessert made with crispy cookies and gooey pastry.
instructions: Whisk together the flour and sugar in a large bowl.
Add the ghee or unsalted butter and mix until crumbly.
Stir in the sour cream and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place the pastry shapes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow the cookies to cool completely on a wire rack.
Dust the cookies with confectioners' sugar and top with chopped nuts.
Serve with a scoop of ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
